allow: Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/php -l app/Http/Controllers/CmsCarouselController.php app/Http/Controllers/CmsGalleryController.php app/Http/Controllers/CmsSettingsController.php app/Http/Controllers/CmsZoneController.php app/Models/CarouselSlide.php app/Models/GalleryImage.php app/Models/SiteSetting.php app/Models/Zone.php app/Http/Controllers/HomeController.php)

Bash(php -r "echo ''upload_max_filesize: '' . ini_get\(''upload_max_filesize''\) . PHP_EOL; echo ''post_max_size: '' . ini_get\(''post_max_size''\) . PHP_EOL; echo ''max_file_uploads: '' . ini_get\(''max_file_uploads''\) . PHP_EOL; echo ''memory_limit: '' . ini_get\(''memory_limit''\) . PHP_EOL;")
